positive: A minimalist, whimsical illustration of a stylized astronaut floating amidst nebulous, bioluminescent cosmic dust. The astronaut should be rendered with clean, thick outlines and a retro sci-fi aesthetic, giving a strong silhouette of a figure in deep space. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blues, teal, vibrant magenta, and electric yellow for high contrast and visual pop. The composition should be centered and suitable for repeat or single placement on apparel. Style: Flat vector illustration mixed with subtle gradient shading, perfect for screen printing. Lighting: High contrast, emphasizing the glow of the nebula against the dark void. Composition: Rule of thirds focus on the figure, framed by cosmic elements. Intricate, crisp lines, vector art style.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, out of focus, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, smudge, realistic photo, photorealism
